meta.title: ANTIQUE
meta.subtitle: Antique, Western Visayas
meta.description: Antique is a hidden gem on the western coast of Panay Island, known for rugged mountain ranges, pristine waterfalls, and rich indigenous culture. The province is home to the Kinaray-a speaking people and boasts the Malumpati Cold Spring, Nogas Island, and the lively Binirayan Festival.

attractions.name: Malumpati Cold Spring
attractions.description: Pristine cold spring with crystal-clear blue waters ideal for swimming and cliff jumping.

attractions.name: Nogas Island
attractions.description: A small uninhabited island with a marine sanctuary boasting rich coral reefs.

attractions.name: Igcabugao Beach
attractions.description: A peaceful gray-sand beach with gentle waves and panoramic sunset views.

attractions.name: Pan-ay River
attractions.description: One of the longest rivers in the Visayas, ideal for kayaking and eco-tours.

attractions.name: Mag-aba Falls
attractions.description: Towering multi-tiered waterfall deep in the Antique mountain forest.

attractions.name: Antique Museum
attractions.description: Houses archaeological findings and artifacts that trace the pre-colonial history of Antique.

attractions.name: Seco Island
attractions.description: A remote white-sand sandbar offering solitude, snorkeling, and pristine sea views.

attractions.name: Maasin River
attractions.description: Fast-flowing river popular for whitewater kayaking and bamboo raft rides.

attractions.name: Mount Madja-as
attractions.description: The legendary mountain of Antique, steeped in Kinaray-a mythology and epic trekking routes.

activities.name: Binirayan Festival
activities.description: Join the epic annual re-enactment of the Bornean datus' arrival at Antique shores.

activities.name: Kayaking on Maasin River
activities.description: Paddle through exciting rapids surrounded by lush tropical forest.

activities.name: Island Hopping Antique
activities.description: Hop between Nogas, Seco, and other islets off Antique's western coast.

activities.name: Hablon Weaving Workshop
activities.description: Learn traditional Kinaray-a textile weaving from master weavers of Antique.

activities.name: Cliff Diving at Malumpati
activities.description: Leap from natural rock ledges into the crystal-clear waters of Malumpati Cold Spring.

activities.name: Trekking Mount Madja-as
activities.description: Multi-day trek through mythological terrain to the summit of Madja-as.

activities.name: Snorkeling at Nogas Island
activities.description: Dive into the marine sanctuary and swim with hundreds of fish species.

activities.name: Bamboo Rafting
activities.description: Float lazily down the Pan-ay River on a traditional bamboo raft.

activities.name: Pottery Workshop
activities.description: Create traditional Antiquean pottery with local craftspeople using age-old techniques.

food.name: Talunon
food.description: Antique's version of boiled pork in sour soup with local vegetables — rich and hearty.

food.name: Inunlan
food.description: Shrimp cooked in taro leaves and coconut milk, a distinctly Kinaray-a seafood dish.

food.name: Piyaya
food.description: Antique's own take on the muscovado-filled flatbread, slightly thicker and crispier.

food.name: Fresh Catch Seafood Grill
food.description: Freshly grilled fish and shellfish served daily by local fisherfolk in San Jose.

food.name: Binakol na Manok
food.description: Chicken cooked in a bamboo tube with coconut water and herbs — a mountain delicacy.

food.name: Latik Rice Pudding
food.description: Creamy rice pudding topped with toasted coconut curds, a traditional Antiquean sweet.

food.name: Kinilaw na Tanigue
food.description: Fresh Spanish mackerel ceviche with vinegar, ginger, and chilies — pure coastal flavor.

food.name: Nilubyan
food.description: A smoky grilled pork dish marinated in native spices and charcoal-cooked over open flame.

food.name: Turon and Saba Banana
food.description: Crispy banana spring rolls and steamed saba bananas, popular Antiquean street foods.

events.name: Binirayan Festival
events.description: December — a grand re-enactment of the Bornean datus' arrival on Panay Island.

events.name: Nogas Island Festival
events.description: May — marine conservation event with boat parades and underwater cleanup drives.

events.name: Tapusan Festival
events.description: June — thanksgiving harvest celebration with street dances and cultural competitions.

events.name: Antique Provincial Trade Fair
events.description: April — provincial fair showcasing local products, handicrafts, and agricultural goods.

events.name: Hablon Weaving Festival
events.description: September — textile festival celebrating Antique's rich tradition of handloom weaving.

events.name: Pan-ay River Festival
events.description: August — water sports and eco-tourism event along the scenic Pan-ay River.

events.name: Fiesta de San Jose
events.description: March 19 — grand fiesta of Antique's capital with processions and cultural performances.

events.name: Tabuk Fishing Festival
events.description: November — a lively coastal festival dedicated to the local freshwater tabuk fish harvest.

events.name: Antique Heritage Day
events.description: October — historical tours, museum exhibits, and indigenous artifact displays.

accommodations.name: Malumpati Lodge
accommodations.description: Simple but scenic lodge set right next to the famous cold spring.

accommodations.name: San Jose Grand Hotel
accommodations.description: The best-equipped hotel in Antique's capital with modern rooms and dining.

accommodations.name: Antique Eco Lodge
accommodations.description: Sustainable bamboo cottages surrounded by native forest and mountain streams.

accommodations.name: Nogas Beach Cottage
accommodations.description: Beachside cottages near the Nogas Island jump-off point with hammocks and sea views.

accommodations.name: Kinaray-a Inn
accommodations.description: Cultural guesthouse with indigenous décor and warm Kinaray-a hospitality.

accommodations.name: Mountain View Resort Antique
accommodations.description: Resort perched on a hillside with sweeping views of the Antique Mountain Range.

accommodations.name: Pensione Buenavista
accommodations.description: Budget pensione in San Jose with clean rooms and a central downtown location.

accommodations.name: Tibiao Surf Camp
accommodations.description: Surf camp on Tibiao beach offering board rentals, lessons, and beachside dorms.

accommodations.name: Coconut Grove Villas
accommodations.description: Private villas set in a grove of coconut palms near the coast of Antique.
